creator: jdhore1@gmail.com
text:
I feel it would be very helpful to users to have a quick "mark out-of-date"
button on the port search results page that will automatically email the
maintainer letting them know their port is out of date if the button is
pressed.

For additional security and to prevent spam, a captcha could probably be added.

Also, to make things easier for the maintainer, perhaps there could be a user
input field to input the new version number.

I feel this would have a lot of benefit for end users as it is much
quicker/easier to click a button and fill out a captcha than it is to file a
full-on bug in bugzilla.
